reasoning_model_1: The model generates the audio with perfect content accuracy, strictly following the provided script '你看这件裙子是不是很漂亮？我一眼就看中了它的颜色和设计。我觉得穿上它去参加派对一定会是全场的焦点呢！'. Regarding the paralinguistic feature 'High Pitch' (音高), the model (which appears to have a male timbre base) adopts a falsetto/head voice technique to significantly raise the pitch throughout the entire utterance. While the timbre sounds slightly unnatural due to the forced high register (resembling a cartoonish or exaggerated male falsetto), it effectively and unmistakably executes the 'High Pitch' command relative to a normal male speaking voice. The expression is consistent, and the pitch remains elevated from 00:00 to 00:10.
reasoning_model_2: The model fails significantly in content accuracy. Instead of reading the provided script, it paraphrases and hallucinates new content: '哎呀，你看这件裙子是不是超漂亮呀？我第一眼就爱上了...肯定能成为全场最闪亮的焦点呢'. This indicates a failure to strictly follow the text-to-speech instruction. Regarding the 'High Pitch' feature, the generated voice is a female voice with a naturally higher pitch range and enthusiastic intonation. While the absolute pitch is high, the model's failure to adhere to the script constitutes a major error. The high pitch seems to be a result of the voice selection/style rather than a specific manipulation of the requested feature on the target text.
model_comparison: Model 1 (T1) is the clear winner. T1 adheres strictly to the text content and successfully applies the 'High Pitch' constraint, demonstrating strong feature control by shifting a male voice into a high-pitched falsetto. Although T1's resulting voice sounds a bit caricatured, it accurately reflects the user's explicit command for high pitch and exact text. Model 2 (T2), while producing a natural-sounding female voice with high pitch, completely fails the content accuracy criterion by rewriting the script (changing words, adding interjections, modifying sentence structure). According to the evaluation criteria, significant inconsistency with the script results in a low score, regardless of the audio quality.
